docs.name: Animated Tabs
docs.description: Tab bar with a sliding pill that morphs between active tabs using layout animation.

props.name: tabs
props.description: Array of tab configurations establishing navigation schema.

props.name: id
props.description: A unique identifier used strictly for layout animations.

props.name: label
props.description: The string/node rendered on the clickable tab button.

props.name: content
props.description: The DOM payload rendered below when this tab is selected.

docs.overview: AnimatedTabs uses a layoutId-driven underline or pill indicator to transition between tabs with a fluid spring. The active indicator follows the selected tab without a hard jump.

scenarios.title: Settings panel
scenarios.description: A classic tab bar for separating profile, notifications, and security settings.

scenarios.title: Dashboard content switcher
scenarios.description: Switch between weekly, monthly, and yearly data views in a dashboard.

scenarios.title: Product feature showcase tabs
scenarios.description: Let marketing highlight different product features with animated tab transitions.
